Comment: Install Certbot and DuckDNS plugin via snap

commands: sudo certbot certonly --authenticator dns-duckdns --dns-duckdns-credentials /home/ubuntu/certbot-credentials/duckdns.ini --dns-duckdns-propagation-seconds 60 --non-interactive --agree-tos --email galvezjon59@gmail.com -d budolws.duckdns.org
